sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْحَمَّامَاتُ الْعَامَّةُ مَكَانًا مُهِمًّا فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Javna kupatila bila su važno mjesto u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: The public baths were an important place in the city.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ يَذْهَبُونَ إِلَيْهَا لِلِاسْتِحْمَامِ وَالرَّاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su odlazili tamo da se okupe i odmore.
sentences.translationEn: People used to go there to bathe and rest.
They would chat and exchange news.

sentences.translation: Kupatila su bila otvorena svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: The baths were open every day.
